weaviate_options.name: Weaviate configuration
weaviate_options.description: Query a Weaviate vector database with user messages and augment the generation with semantically-similar results

data_description.weaviate_api_key: Your API key, if authentication is required

data.max_message_history: Max message history size (0 for no limit)

data_description.model: The model to use for the conversation agent
data_description.prompt: Instruct how the LLM should respond. This can be a template
data_description.parallel_tool_calls: Allow the model to use multiple tools in a single turn
data_description.temperature: Lower for more predictable responses, higher for more randomness
data_description.content_injection_method: The message role to insert dynamic content as. See the readme for details
data_description.enable_smart_discovery: Replace the per-turn entity dump with a structural index plus on-demand discovery tools. Drops typical system-prompt size from ~8k to ~1.5k tokens at 90 entities. Requires selecting 'Personality LLM Smart Discovery' in Tool Providers (and unchecking the default Assist API for max savings).

data.chat_template_kwargs: Add custom arguments that are supported by your chosen model

data_description.weaviate_hybrid_search_alpha: Balance between 0 for pure keyword search, and 1 for pure vector similarity search

error.invalid_speaker_id: Speaker ID must be 1–50 characters: lowercase letters, numbers and underscores only
error.personal_context_too_long: Context must be 500 characters or fewer

init.title: Personality Settings
init.description: Choose how your assistant behaves and sounds. Enable per-user profiles to give each person their own style.

data.allow_personality_override: Allow users to override house personality
data.allow_full_prompt_override: Allow users to fully override system prompt (advanced)

data_description.assistant_name: What the assistant calls itself (e.g. JARVIS, Aria, Assistant)
data_description.personality_style: Sets the overall character. Some combinations may produce inconsistent results — for example, Sarcastic + Formal response style may conflict. Try different combinations to find what works.
data_description.humor_level: How much humor to inject. Works alongside the personality style.
data_description.response_style: Controls length and formality of responses.

advanced_prompts.name: Advanced (raw prompts)
advanced_prompts.description: Override the generated personality with custom prompt text. Changes here take priority over the structured settings above. Use these if you need precise control or are migrating an existing configuration.

data_description.house_model_prompt: Base behaviour instructions: what the assistant can do, safety rules, tool usage. Applied before the entity list.
data_description.house_personality_prompt: Legacy raw personality prompt. Used as a fallback when all personality dropdowns are set to Custom.

user_select.title: Configure a user personality
user_select.description: Select an existing user to edit, or type a new speaker ID to create one. The speaker ID must match the identifier sent by your voice identification system (e.g. "paul"). It will be converted to lowercase automatically. Submit with no selection to save and close. {configured} user(s) currently configured.

data_description.selected_user: Lowercase letters, numbers and underscores only — converted to lowercase on save

user_personality.title: Personal Settings for {user}
user_personality.description: Personalise how the assistant speaks to {user}.

data_description.display_name: Friendly name shown in logs and used in prompts (e.g. Paul)
data_description.pronouns: Optional — how this person prefers to be referred to (e.g. he/him, she/her, they/them). Leave blank to omit.
data_description.personality_style: Override the house personality style for this person. Leave on 'Use house default' to inherit.
data_description.humor_level: Override the humor level for this person. Leave on 'Use house default' to inherit.
data_description.response_style: Override the response style for this person. Leave on 'Use house default' to inherit.
data_description.address_style: Controls how the assistant opens responses to this person.
data_description.personal_context: Short background the assistant can use when talking to this person — their role, interests, or preferences. Plain English, not prompt instructions. Maximum 500 characters.

advanced_prompts.name: Advanced (raw prompts)
advanced_prompts.description: Raw prompt text for power users. When set, these take priority over the structured settings above. Personality prompt is additive (appended); override prompt replaces the house personality.

data.override_house_personality: Replace house personality with override prompt
data.full_prompt_override: Full prompt override (replaces all house prompts)

data_description.personality_prompt: Appended after the generated personality directives. Leave blank to rely on the structured settings above.
data_description.override_house_personality: When enabled, the override prompt below replaces the generated house personality instead of appending.
data_description.personality_override_prompt: Used instead of the generated personality when the override toggle is on.
data_description.full_prompt_override: Replaces the entire system prompt — house and user settings are ignored.
